message:
fix: rewrite bench_logic_table to use REAL metal0 compiled code

Previous benchmark was FAKE - hand-written Zig pretending to be @logic_table.

Now uses actual metal0-compiled lib/vector_ops.a:
- Source: benchmarks/vector_ops.py (pure Python loops)
- Compiled: metal0 build --emit-logic-table

REAL baseline results (dim=384):
- dot_product: 21890 ns compiled vs 411 ns native (53x slower)
- sum_squares: 16066 ns compiled vs 382 ns native (42x slower)
- sum_values:  19044 ns compiled vs 1332 ns native (14x slower)

Correctness: ✓ All results match exactly

This is the honest baseline for optimization work.
